title: Unwritten
why_this_song: Unwritten by Natasha Bedingfield (2004) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 15 times; first heard in: "No one else can feel it for you"
Appears 13 times; first heard in: "Let the sun illuminate the words that you cannot find"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "Feel the rain on your skin"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Open up the dirty window"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "I am unwritten"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Feel the rain on your skin
No one else can feel it for you
Only you can let it in
No one else, no one else
Staring at the blank page before you
Let the sun illuminate the words that you cannot find

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "else" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "else" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "words" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Can't read my mind, I'm undefined
Feel the rain on your skin
No one else, no one else

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Unwritten" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Unwritten"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Natasha Bedingfield one question about "Unwritten", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Natasha Bedingfield sobre "Unwritten", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Unwritten" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Unwritten" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
